creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->closed

Well, the reason that the update *to* 4.18_1 still asked you about 
removing the users is that the change was in the *deinstall* script :) 
Thus, the update from 4.18 to 4.18_1 ran the deinstall script for 4.18, 
which would ask questions, for the last time :)  From here on, any update 
you make, from 4.18_1 to any later version, will be hassle-free. 
Still, thanks for trying to make FreeBSD better by reporting what you 
thought was a genuine problem!
